hero.title: Global cannabis policy, clearly mapped
hero.subtitle: Evidence-first coverage of legalization, medical access, and public policy status across countries and regions.
hero.disclaimer: Educational only. All data must be verified against official sources before publication.

overview.title: Legal status overview
overview.subtitle: Filter by policy category, continent, and medical or recreational access.

highlights.title: Recent policy highlights
highlights.subtitle: Watch for regulatory changes and notable updates.

statistics.title: Policy landscape metrics
statistics.subtitle: Key indicators built from the structured policy dataset.

education.title: Understand legal terminology
education.subtitle: Clear definitions to avoid ambiguity when comparing countries.

sources.title: Sources and references
sources.subtitle: Every record must link to official sources for verification and transparency.

faq.question: Is this platform advocating for cannabis?
faq.answer: No. This platform is educational and focuses on legislation, public policy, and regulatory context.

faq.question: Where does the data come from?
faq.answer: Each record links to official sources. Verify and update before public publication.

faq.question: How often is data updated?
faq.answer: Updates depend on your pipeline; each country record includes a last updated field.
